final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for 绿联私有云, an e-commerce promotional banner for the 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: bold e-commerce key visual, flat illustration with glossy product rendering, inspired by Tmall/JD.com 618 grand sale aesthetics
Composition: vertical poster layout, hero product (NAS/private cloud device) centered in lower half, large headline text dominating upper third, layered depth with floating decorative elements
Subject: 绿联私有云 branded private cloud / NAS device as hero product, surrounded by celebratory 618 sale graphic elements — burst shapes, ribbons, coins, discount badges
Scene/backdrop: deep gradient background in brand green (#00A550 range) transitioning to dark navy, with radial light burst behind the product
Lighting/mood: high-energy festive atmosphere, bright specular highlights on product surface, warm golden accent glow suggesting celebration and value
Color palette: brand green as dominant, gold/yellow as celebration accent, white for text legibility, deep navy as depth anchor
Materials/textures: glossy hard-shell product surface with clean reflections, metallic gold foil texture on badge elements
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云" "618" "周年庆"
Constraints: text must be legible at mobile screen size; brand name "绿联私有云" must be the most prominent typographic element; 618 numeral must be oversized as focal graphic
Avoid: generic stock-photo backgrounds, cluttered illegible layouts, mismatched color temperatures, watermarks, low-contrast text on busy background
